notes:
vMLX 1.6.17

Runtime, parser, cache, UI, and packaging checkpoint.

Highlights:
- Hardens separate reasoning, visible content, and tool-call streaming across OpenAI Chat/Responses, Anthropic, Ollama, direct sessions, and the Electron gateway.
- Ships KaTeX-backed chat/reasoning rendering while preserving raw API bytes and literal currency.
- Applies model-derived sampling/parser defaults to fresh sessions and preserves explicit saved overrides.
- Adds scoped typed cache and L2 restore fixes/proofs across Qwen, Laguna, Bonsai, Gemma, MiniMax M2.7/M3, DSV4, OpenPangu, HY3, and related families; generic TurboQuant remains suppressed where native sparse/composite cache state owns correctness.
- Recursively Developer-ID signs and audits every bundled Mach-O leaf before notarization.
- Bundles vmlx_engine 1.6.17 and jang_tools 2.5.34 from exact verified source.

Verification:
- Exact source/tag: d03ec297ef269bceb8a805726f6733a8c497f130 / v1.6.17.
- Panel: 86 files, 2493 passed, 3 skipped; TypeScript and production build passed.
- Python: 6411 passed, 97 skipped, 92 deselected; the only one-shot failure was an isolated fallback JANG-source-version mismatch, and its exact JANG 2.5.34 verifier passed separately.
- Both DMGs passed recursive Mach-O audit, Developer ID signing, Apple notarization, stapling, Gatekeeper, mounted imports, and installed-app launch.
- Signed-app direct/gateway streaming produced separate reasoning and visible content with correct terminal events. MiniMax M3 UI Stop/Start restored 600 prompt tokens from 10 SSD blocks and retained its native MSA/indexer cache tuple.

Known follow-up:
- This is a public usable checkpoint, not closure of every retained family/media/gateway/cache stress row. One adversarial persisted M3 history turn finalized reasoning-only while fresh UI/direct/gateway prompts were healthy; it remains a P0 follow-up. Full longest-prefix eviction/refault matrices, Paged-Off SSD-only breadth, cache-cap eviction, memory-risk warnings, media breadth, and longer gateway/model-swap soak remain PARTIAL.
